description: Composition Blue and navy blue round neck printed kurta made of lightweight 100% cotton, sleeveless, has a 4 buttoned placket, small darts to give shape and decoration at the neckline and long vents at sides Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which, along with the sleeveless shape, will keep you cool in warm weather. Wear this over leggings or over jeans depending on the occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
